title: Platform Migration Risk Assessment
scope: Q3 cloud migration for customer billing and reporting services
summary: Twelve risks identified across technical, operational, and compliance domains. Three are rated high priority due to customer-facing impact during cutover weekend. Mitigations focus on rollback readiness, staged traffic shifting, and enhanced monitoring.

risks.description: Data sync lag during dual-write period causes billing discrepancies
risks.mitigation: Automated reconciliation job with alerting; freeze rate changes during cutover

risks.description: Third-party payment gateway timeout under peak load
risks.mitigation: Load test at 2x peak; circuit breaker with retry queue
Dry-run incident simulation; update runbooks by June 20
